name: TitleMax Title Loans
description_short: TitleMax offers car title loans, secured flex lines of credit, and unsecured personal loans with same-day cash and approval for most credit types.
description_long:
TitleMax is one of the largest title lending companies in the United States, with the Memphis Summer Avenue location having operated since February 2007. The company targets consumers who need fast access to cash and may not qualify for traditional bank loans, offering products secured by vehicle titles as an alternative path to funding regardless of credit history.

The core product is a title pledge, where borrowers use a clear vehicle title as collateral to secure a loan. Alongside this, TitleMax offers a flex line of credit — also secured by the vehicle — that allows customers to draw funds up to a credit limit over time rather than in a single lump sum. A third product, an unsecured flexible line of credit, is available both in-store and online, with online access restricted to ten states: AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, and WI. For all products, TitleMax does conduct a credit check, though the vehicle title helps offset credit risk and expands eligibility to most credit types.

What distinguishes TitleMax from pawn shops or payday lenders is the keep-your-car policy: borrowers retain use of their vehicle while repaying the loan. The Summer Avenue location offers bilingual service and maintains extended weekday hours (9am–7pm Monday and Friday), and the store carries a 5.00/5 average rating across 481+ Google reviews, with multiple reviewers specifically naming staff members by name. The unsecured line of credit option adds flexibility for borrowers who prefer not to use their vehicle as collateral.

TitleMax fills a genuine gap for consumers with impaired credit and an immediate cash need, but title loans carry significant risk. Interest rates on title products are typically extremely high — often 100–300% APR — though specific rates are not disclosed on this store page. Defaulting on a title loan can result in vehicle repossession. These products are best treated as a last resort when other options (credit union PALs, employer advances, family loans) are exhausted. The unsecured line of credit may be a lower-risk alternative for eligible borrowers who qualify.
pros: Same-day cash disbursement for approved applicants
Keep driving your vehicle throughout the loan term
Most credit types accepted — vehicle title offsets credit risk
Three distinct product options: title pledge, secured flex LOC, and unsecured LOC
Bilingual staff available at this Memphis location
5.00/5 Google rating across 481+ reviews at this specific store
cons: Interest rates on title loans are not disclosed on the website and are typically extremely high (100–300% APR range industry-wide)
Vehicle repossession is a real consequence of default — collateral risk is significant
Online unsecured personal loans restricted to only 10 states
Closed Sundays, limiting emergency weekend access
Credit check is still required despite marketing to poor-credit borrowers
best_for: Vehicle owners with a clear (paid-off) title who need cash the same day
Borrowers with poor or thin credit history who cannot qualify for traditional personal loans
Tennessee residents needing a flex line of credit with draw-as-needed flexibility
Consumers in AZ, DE, ID, KS, MO, MS, SC, TN, TX, UT, or WI seeking an online unsecured line of credit
diagnosis: TitleMax is best suited for vehicle owners with impaired credit who have exhausted other emergency cash options and need funds the same day. The central caveat is cost and collateral risk: title loans carry extremely high interest rates and defaulting puts your vehicle at risk — these are emergency products, not long-term financial solutions.
services: Car title pledge loans (secured by vehicle title)
Flex line of credit (secured, draw up to credit limit over time)
Bilingual customer service (at Summer Avenue location)
Loan management via customer portal (title loans and personal loans tracked separately)
